name: elan_registry
description: This is code for the Lotus Elan Registry hosted at https://elanregistry.org. It is used in conjunction with Userspice (https://userspice.com) to build an online database for Lotus Elan and Lotus Elan +2 cars.

scripts.test:
echo '
📋 Available Tests:

  PHP Unit Tests (128 tests):
    composer test:quick

  E2E Tests - Production (24 tests):
    npm run test:e2e              # All E2E tests on elanregistry.org
    npm run test:e2e:not-logged-in  # Public pages only
    npm run test:e2e:logged-in      # Authenticated user tests

  E2E Tests - Test Environment (24 tests):
    npm run test:e2e:test         # All E2E tests on test.elanregistry.org
    npm run test:e2e:test:not-logged-in  # Public pages only
    npm run test:e2e:test:logged-in      # Authenticated user tests

  Local Playwright Tests - Localhost (16 tests, requires MAMP):
    npm run playwright:test       # All local tests
    npm run playwright:security   # Security tests (2)
    npm run playwright:maps       # Maps & charts (8)
    npm run playwright:csp        # CSP validation (6)

  Note: Local tests require web server at http://localhost:9999/elan_registry
'
